hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*\b(main|master)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not push directly to main/master. Create a feature branch first.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Force push requires explicit user approval. Ask before proceeding.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'wrangler\s+deploy'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never deploy directly. Push to GitHub and let CI handle it.' >&2; exit 2; fi
